description: Configure access controls for a new junior sales representative, Sarah Mitchell. Create a profile named 'Junior Sales Access' that disables access to 'Invoice', 'Sales Order', and 'Purchase Order' modules while keeping 'Contacts', 'Organizations', 'Leads', and 'Opportunities' enabled. Establish a new role named 'Junior Sales Rep' subordinate to the 'Sales Person' role and assign it the 'Junior Sales Access' profile. Register the new user with the following details: First Name: Sarah, Last Name: Mitchell, Username: sarah.mitchell, Email: sarah.mitchell@greenfield-dist.com, Password: SecurePass2024!, Role: Junior Sales Rep, and Admin Access: Disabled.
